stateKeys.name: state
stateKeys.type: enum: DRAFT | PENDING_APPROVAL | APPROVED | RELEASED | ACKNOWLEDGED | EXECUTED | CLOSED | ABORTED | EXPIRED

stateKeys.name: proposer
stateKeys.type: string actor id, or null before submit

stateKeys.name: approvers
stateKeys.type: array of distinct approver ids (never includes the proposer)

stateKeys.name: window_start
stateKeys.type: number (logical tick), or null before submit

stateKeys.name: window_end
stateKeys.type: number (logical tick), or null before submit

dataFields.now: logical tick at which expiry is checked

specialRules.name: approver-not-proposer
specialRules.note: approve is a no-op (reject 'approver-is-proposer') when actor == proposer. Enforces one half of S1.

specialRules.name: distinct-approvers
specialRules.note: approve is a no-op (reject 'duplicate-approver') when actor is already in approvers. A redelivered approval never counts twice; APPROVED needs 2 DISTINCT ids.

specialRules.name: approve-in-window
specialRules.note: approve is a no-op (reject 'approve-out-of-window') unless window_start <= now <= window_end.

specialRules.name: release-in-window
specialRules.note: release fires (and emits transmit) only when now is in window; else reject 'release-out-of-window'. S2.

specialRules.name: execute-in-window
specialRules.note: execute fires (and emits execute) only when now is in window; else reject 'execute-out-of-window'. S2.

specialRules.name: expire-after-window-end
specialRules.note: expire fires only when now > window_end; else reject 'expire-before-window-end'.

specialRules.name: abort-pre-execution-only
specialRules.note: abort is allowed only from PENDING_APPROVAL/APPROVED/RELEASED/ACKNOWLEDGED; a no-op elsewhere (reject 'abort-not-allowed-here'). L1 recall.
